heading: Why trust this LA neighborhood guide
intro: This guide is built from real neighborhood-level experience across Los Angeles — what each area actually feels like to live in and visit, not just the tourist brochure version.

items.title: Honest neighborhood assessments
items.text: Every neighborhood is described as it actually is — including the trade-offs. If an area requires a car, has safety caveats, or is overpriced, this guide says so directly.

items.title: Covers the full range
items.text: From $50/night hostel areas to $500/night luxury neighborhoods — this guide covers what LA actually offers across the full spectrum of budgets and travel styles.

items.title: Transport-aware
items.text: Every neighborhood assessment includes the honest transport reality. LA is not walkable outside a few specific areas — this guide tells you exactly what you can and cannot do without a car.

items.title: Current for 2026
items.text: LA neighborhoods shift quickly. DTLA has gentrified significantly, Koreatown has expanded. This guide reflects the current reality of each area.

footer: If you want to understand LA's neighborhoods honestly — not the sanitized version — this guide gives you the real picture.
